programme.title: JFK
programme.desc: Obsessed with getting answers a district attorney risks his family, his career and his very life to find the truth of the JFK assassination.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: Forget office politics, only the smartest will survive this bloody office outing.

programme.title: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A hard-working small business owner and his two associates travel to Europe to close the most important deal of their lives. But what began as a routine business trip goes off the rails in every way imaginable, and unimaginable.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Deviating from the quest to fulfill a mission from Orwin, the Final Dreamers find themselves escorting an old nemesis to Naroom: Shalax the bounty hunter. The Shadow Magi want him too!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: The Posse is battling with Skor over a crystal near the local airport, when the crystal slips out of both their hands and flies into a suitcase being loaded onto a passenger jet. The Posse springs into action to recover the crystal.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet wakes up on the floor of the museum one day to find it over-run by Skor and his Links. On top of that, Kane, Chow, and Lucy seemed to have joined forces with Skor, as they obey his every command. What happened?

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: When the Final Hyren quest lands the kids in Bograth, they discover the strange, swamp-laden realm. The rampant void energy poisoning the swamp has changed the Bograthians - and their Guardian Hyren - into mutated, rat-like creatures.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The A-R-C is in Hawaii for a race through a series of dormant volcanoes.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet is wake-boarding across Lake Megalopolis when he does an aerial move, and tries to land… only to crash into a dry lake bed. All of the lake’s water has suddenly vanished, leaving behind only fish and the speedboat Chow was using to tow Jet.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Dreamers travel to Nar, where Edyn is to study with a peculiar spellcaster named Ust while Tony and Strag battle an old foe, Sikan, to find their way to the Guardian Hyren of Nar. Ust's different ways of thinking end up helping to their quest.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: With both the Moonlands Diamond and Orwin's staff in their hands, the Final Dreamers still can't figure out how to merge them into the Realm's Honor staff, the relic used to magine the Final Hyren.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Dr. Piranoid creates a new Seaviate hench-creature - Killamari, a gene-slammed Giant Squid with a venomous sting.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: Crime boss, Carmone Fontaine, father of Johnny’s friend Doug, decides to go straight as a way to win back his son’s respect, and the Metajets are brought in to escort him to New York, where he will surrender himself to authorities

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon
programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The WPT Invitational VII is a high stakes Hollywood poker party.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's Freddy's game to lose but the invitation is wide open to snatch a WPT title from his grasp.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The most successful female tournament player takes dead aim on her first WPT championship.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Sparks fly in Northern California as the players takes aim at chip leader Kathy Liebert.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Vadim Trincher presses his relentless attacks in pursuit of the $730,000 first place prize.

programme.title: 60 days in Jail
programme.desc: 60 Days In Jail sends undercover volunteers into jails to expose the real stories of life inside. These harrowing journeys serve a higher purpose, helping those in charge improve conditions. Facing danger and loneliness, can they last?

programme.desc: This episode includes: Casino Bandit, Update: Carolina Cop Killer, Cop Assault, Amelia Earhart (Pts. 1 & 2) and Down on the Farm.

programme.desc: This episode includes: Direct Contact, Green River Killer & UD, Foster Son & UD and Murder in Connecticut & UD.

programme.desc: This episode includes: Brandon Lee, Missing Anchorwoman, First Love, Second Chance & UD, Killer Castro and Gulf P.O.W. Dream.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.title: Pulling With My Parents: Episode 5
programme.desc: Returning for a second series. Young singletons from across the country are handing over the reins to their parents to give their dating profiles a full make-over to crack the cupid conundrum.

programme.title: Pulling With My Parents: Episode 6
programme.desc: Returning for a second series. Young singletons from across the country are handing over the reins to their parents to give their dating profiles a full make-over to crack the cupid conundrum.

programme.title: Pulling With My Parents: Episode 1
programme.desc: Thirty-year-old Jason is keen to find someone to settle down with. He’s handing control over to his Mother, Anne and Dad, Pat, to find him the perfect woman.

programme.title: Pulling With My Parents: Episode 2
programme.desc: Dating show which sees young singletons hand over control of their dating profiles to their parents. In episode two we meet Meghann Scully and Daniel Lally with their families.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tonya Jones finds out what her husband really means by "working late." Follow up with Tiffany Brookins.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 14
programme.desc: Rose Harden ends her three-year relationship. Follow up with Emmett Croham.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 15
programme.desc: Maria Dominguez confronts her unfaithful husband at a haunted house. Follow up with Tammy Taylor.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 180
programme.desc: Is it impossible for humans to walk in a straight line without a point of reference? Will binary explosives explode in the case of a fender bender?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 118
programme.desc: Does drinking alcohol make people look more attractive? Do alleged ways of sobering up really work? Could ancient Korean hwacha actually do what is claimed of it?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 181
programme.desc: Is a motorcycle more environmentally friendly than a car? Can a bullet take out an RPG?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 182
programme.desc: Can C4 be used as a cooking fuel? Can you make a throwing weapon that could decapitate an opponent and carry the head back to the thrower?

programme.title: MythBusters: Top 25 Almost Special
programme.desc: The top 25 moments of "MythBusters" are counted down by the cast with additional comments.

programme.desc: Musical set in Bensonhurst, N.Y. In it a two-timing husband must choose between his mistress and his beleaguered wife.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Leeds Library and attempts to communicate with a spirit known by the name of Sternberg. Will his investigation have a happy ending?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Altrincham, Greater Manchester to investigate The Old Market Tavern. Once used as a coaching inn and a court house, many spirits still lurk here and Sean captures one of the most clearest EVP's ever.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his paranormal investigation at The Old Market Tavern and he appears to have attracted the attention of spirit that launches a physical attack on him. Will he survive the night?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean heads to Astley Green to the infamous Astley Green Colliery Museum. So many reports of paranormal activity have been confirmed at the mine, from lost miners to tormented souls.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation into Astley Green Colliery Museum and attempts to make further contact with the souls and spirits who have lost their lives there. Will he succeed?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Oswestry to investigate claims of hauntings at a castle thousands of years old, and believed to be haunted by an angry judge. Will any of the souls that departed here come out to play?

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Clutch Hawks enters Wildcat in the demolition duel in Memphis, only to learn Vanessa Warfield and Bruno "Mad Dog" Sheppard are also entered, with Manta and Stinger.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink Hi-Tops
programme.desc: Pink Panther thinks he wants a pair of high-tech hi-top sneakers until he puts them on.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Beau Duckula
programme.desc: Duckula joins the French foreign legion in Leicester.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: At a special show for the Emir of Amrah, ten of the famous Lippizaner horses stampede and disappear.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse must stop Greenback who has placed a device at the North Pole to stop the Earth's rotation and cancel gravity.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Hunchbudgie of Notre Dame
programme.desc: Duckula, Igor and Nanny are involved in a series of art thefts in Paris.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Who's Smiling Now': Rookie police officer Panther is assigned to assist the great 'Inspector' in solving the case of the missing Mona Lisa. 'Rob'n Hoodwinked': the Panther joins up with the Dogfather who is posing as the famed Robin Hood.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pink-Anderthal Man': Manly Man pursues the Panther through the ages. 'Pink Kong': Despite strong opposition from Voodoo Man, the Panther helps Queen Kong realize her dream of becoming a famous torch singer in New York City.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Sometimes even Mask just wants to have fun. That's why Matt Tracker'and Boris Bushkin in Bulldog have joined Brad Turner in Cheetah and Calhoun Burns in Raven at the Round Up Races.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink Or Consequences
programme.desc: Pink Panther becomes an unwitting contestant on a game show to win a year's supply of his favorite beverage.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 30
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander & Martin Roberts visit a building in Harrogate with bags of potential and a jaw dropping history, a unique piece of land in Ashbourne and finally a 3 bedroomed house in Plymouth, Devon with a slippery past.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a a house in Swindon, a flat in Neasden, Greater London and revisit a fabulous Manor Farm house near Lincoln.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 20
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a property in Wales, a property in London, and a house with a huge cellar in Watford.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 21
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a three bed semi in Stockport, a commercial property in Rochester and a plot of land in Cornwall.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: While The Rolling Stones rehearse 'Sympathy for the Devil' in the studio, Godard reflects on Society, politics and culture through five vignettes.

programme.title: Brazil
programme.desc: In the retro-future world, a government bureaucrat tries to correct an administrative error and quickly finds himself an enemy of the state.

programme.title: The Vampire's Night Orgy
programme.desc: Stranded travelers seek refuge in a remote village, only to discover it's inhabited by vampires with sinister intentions.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Deadly Women: An Inconvenient Marriage
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion; it can drive women to unthinkable crimes of passion. Hate however, is love's gloomy shadow, and it can drive women into the darkest corners of their mind.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loathe Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Neighbors can be a source of friendship and community comfort. But what happens when a neighbor stops watching out for you, and starts watching you. The sinister minds of these women begin to turn sour and they begin to torment their neighbors.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives. These women all had a fatal fixation.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Baby-Faced Killers
programme.desc: These baby-faced girls may look childish and innocent, but behind their little girl smiles lies a darkness most adults never experience. When their inner turmoil bubbles to the surface, they become unlikely criminals.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Baby-Faced Killers
programme.desc: These baby-faced girls may look childish and innocent, but behind their little girl smiles lies a darkness most adults never experience. When their inner turmoil bubbles to the surface, they become unlikely criminals.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sins of the Sister
programme.desc: A sisterly bond can mean a life full of friendship and sibling love. But for some women, having a sister means nothing more then having their own personal meal ticket, scapegoat and combatant. These types of relationships can lead to deadly outcomes.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sins of the Sister
programme.desc: A sisterly bond can mean a life full of friendship and sibling love. But for some women, having a sister means nothing more then having their own personal meal ticket, scapegoat and combatant. These types of relationships can lead to deadly outcomes.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: Every day, teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and slammed bedroom doors. Some daughters won’t take "no" for an answer, and these girls become deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: Every day, teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and slammed bedroom doors. Some daughters won’t take "no" for an answer, and these girls become deadly.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko stages a seance for gullible Sgt. Ritzik in an attempt to advise Ritzik on how to spend his money.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko enters the hotel business, but as soon as he starts to make money. two of his soldier buddies burn down the hotel.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Trying to help his colonel get promoted, Sgt. Bilko decides to wangle Col. Hall into the President's golf foursome.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko tries to promote a sharpshooter into a modern Annie Oakley, but love gets in the way.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Fed up with whip-cracking officers, Sgt. Bilko has one of his own men promoted to officer's rank.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: Sgt. Bilko goes into the auto business after necessity forces him to convert an Army jeep into a small foreign-looking car.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: When the men of Camp Fremont rebel against his gambling tactics, Sgt. Bilko starts a campaign to separate the Wacs from their earnings.

programme.title: The Phil Silvers Show
programme.desc: During Col. Hall's absence Sgt. Bilko brings in an exact twin of the colonel's who turns the officer's club into a gambling casino.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The prisoners create an elaborate underground ruse to fool a German spy that has been placed in their ranks.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary series profiling the work of a high-speed police unit. The officers intercept a stolen car, foil a cannabis grower, engage in a series of drugs raids and calm a drunken sailor. (4/15)

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley helps two badly injured bikers and a drink-driver leaves a trail of destruction.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary series following an Essex police unit.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 12
programme.desc: Damo finds a man unconscious and a suspicious driver tries to outfox the interceptors.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hoppsy goes after a disqualified driver who legs it.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 2
programme.desc: This week, Jon puts his body on the line as he tackles a drunken yob in a domestic row.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Had a mysterious German prospector, known as the Dutchman, found the richest gold mine in America? When he died keeping the mine’s location secret, Dick Holmes - a young cowhand - went on a quest to track it down.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A fortune in gold is buried in the Rocky Mountains, with only a cryptic map as a clue. For nearly 200 years, descendants of a French expedition have sought it. But the Curse of Treasure Mountain has thwarted all attempts to find the hidden bullion.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of Hiram Bingham's amazing discovery of one of the great wonders of the modern world, Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Bigfoot Hunters
programme.desc: Legend Hunters try to determine if a eight foot tall ape runs wild in North America.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Myths of the Iroquois
programme.desc: Mason Windfield and has team investigate Iroquois Legends and find an ancient burial ground and an exorcism that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Legend Hunters, led by Graham Phillips, decipher clues and search for the final resting place of the ancient Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Female Murderers
programme.desc: Women usually kill in their own peculiar way: sophisticated, tactically, and from behind. They prefer tainted medicines, knives, or poison. And they often kill for years, unnoticed and in secret.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Angels of Death
programme.desc: In hospitals and nursing wards, death is an everyday occurrence. And that is precisely what they count on: angels of death. Some of them rack up more victims in this way than the worst serial killers in the world.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Bank robbers. They are clever, planning their crimes for years. And if necessary, they even put human lives at risk. For investigators, each heist is different. But all robbers have one thing in common: they steal millions.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .
programme.desc: Carnie Wilson (The Carnie Wilson Show, Wilson Phillips) travels to Weed, California where a ghostly visit traumatized her many years ago.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .
programme.desc: Patrick Muldoon (Melrose Place, Starship Troopers) faces his worst fears when he revisits an Inn in Charleston, SC, where he was once attacked by an evil entity.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .

programme.title: 4 Dollars of Revenge

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Infiltration
programme.desc: M.A.D. agent, Presto Change0, impersonated Inspector Gadget at a secret meeting. Chief Quimby and Penny foil their evil plans.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Weather In Tibet

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Mad In The Moon

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget In Winterland Aka Winter Olympics (The Pilot)

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget's Clean Sweep

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Photo Safari (Black Devil)

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: N.S.F. Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Dry Spell

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: No Flies On Us
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget travels to Malaysia to find the famous explorers that were captured by Dr. Claw. Chief Quimby, Penny and Brain, infected with a deadly virus, are also captured.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.title: Locked Down
programme.desc: A wrongly imprisoned cop is forced into fighting underground cage matches. With the help of an inmate who’s a former full-contact champ, he’s determined to be the last man standing.

programme.title: Over the Top

programme.title: The Air I Breathe
programme.desc: A drama based on an ancient Chinese proverb that breaks life down into four emotional cornerstones: happiness, pleasure, sorrow and love. A businessman bets his life on a horse race; a gangster sees the future; a pop star falls prey to a crime boss.

programme.title: High Crimes

programme.title: The Client

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two crew members of a spaceship wake up from hypersleep to discover that all their colleagues are missing. Despite this, it appears that they are not alone. Starring: Dennis Quaid, Ben Foster, Cam Gigandet

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch

programme.title: Sensing Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb
programme.desc: A chilling investigation of John Ernest Cribb, who on August 11, 1978 broke into the home of the Connell's. On a winter’s afternoon, Valda Connell and her four-year-old son Damien arrived home after having collected ten-year-old Sally from school.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: Michael Kanaan was an angry young man in a hurry to make a name for himself in Sydney’s underworld. But his volatile temper and penchant for violence soon led him to kill three men before he was finally captured in a wild shootout with Sydney police.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Greenough Family Massacre

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If the Shirt Fits...
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rock-a-Bye Bounty
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Father-Hood
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cops and Criminals
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cupid in Cuffs
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bonds of Love
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: To Love and to Cherish
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from - Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist
programme.desc: John Luke and Sadie are getting some dental work done, complete with sedation, and it's up to Willie and Korie to take care of them through the process - including getting them back home safely.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack-O-Lantern
programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse." Everyone dresses up and Willie desperately tries to be the scariest, but none of the kids are afraid of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: O Little Town of West Monroe
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Boomerang Becca
programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si gets sick, he seeks the help of Ms. Kay to take care of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie's Number Two
programme.desc: When Willie is looking to hire a new assistant, Korie insists he interviews her cousin, JD. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si spends the day over at Phil and Kay's, Jep stops by with the kids to keep them away from Jessica, who has taken ill.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Life of Si
programme.desc: After seeing footage Jep shot using a GoPro, Si decides he wants to use the camera to record a day in his life. But when Si gets on the guys nerves while they're hunting, they kick him and his GoPros out of the blind.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Just a Talk
programme.desc: Andi and Gary decide to accelerate their engagement, but there are doubts with those close to them due to past experiences. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Being a Big Boy
programme.desc: Andi lets Gary know that she is not ready to marry him. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: The Chase
programme.desc: The couples of this union are challenged with the inconsistency of their relationships. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Protecting Myself
programme.desc: Andi is walking a thin line seeing Robin behind Gary's back while trying to stay out of Fatima, Karen and Zac's love triangle. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: The Game: We've Gotta Stop Meeting Like This
programme.desc: Tasha takes steps to prove to Pookie that she's dedicated to him while simultaneously struggling with her attraction to Rick. Keira and Blue address the aftermath of their New York encounter after constantly running into each other in San Diego.

programme.title: The Game: Getting To Know All A Butt You
programme.desc: In an attempt to expand his empire beyond football, Malik seeks out an investor for his new business venture. Meanwhile, after having brunch with Brittany, Jason and Chardonnay begin to question how well they really know one another.

programme.title: The Game: Trashbox
programme.desc: Keira bids a lot of money on a datewith Blue at a charity auction in order to maintain her high-profile image, resulting in a confession that her income isn't as expendable as it used to be.

programme.title: The Game: Guess Who's Bizzack
programme.desc: When Blue struggles at training camp, Jason takes to the field to show him how it's done, winning praise from Malik, who tries to convince his former teammate to re-sign with the Sabers.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Moat House Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Moat House Part 2
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Tamworth and a beautiful manor house that is said to be filled with paranormal occurrences. Almost as soon as the team get there something seems to want to make itself known with dramatic effect

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 1
programme.desc: The Most Haunted tackle the deserted sprawling Ashwell Prison in this As-Live uncut episode. Feeling isolated and separated the team find themselves confronted by something in the dark.

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 2
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to film at Ashwell Prison after being pushed to the limits tempers fray and Yvette is stuck alone, petrified as she is stalked by an unseen force lost in the corridors of the prison and the team scramble to save her

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Smile in the Third Row
programme.desc: The lead actor in a Broadway play claims that God is attending the show's performances, sitting in a third-row orchestra seat.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Secret
programme.desc: The teenage daughter of Mark's friend tries to find her biological mother. It may tear the family apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark connect a young blind woman with a disfigured artist.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty is on hand to provide legal assistance. He defends the young artist with a facial deformity who has been accused of assaulting a blind girl.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark go to work at a football team. They learn that one of the players has been getting drugs from the team doctor.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Everyone's excited at the prospect of Leopard's Den's new arrival. Bash, Danny's old tutor and Rosie's Godfather, is coming from England to help Danny grow his veterinary practice.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: The Trevanions are delighted when Fatani asks Danny to take an aggressive hippo off his hands. As they prepare for its arrival Sarah gets a bit of a shock when her mother Caroline beats the hippo to the post.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Business is looking up at Leopard's Den but Sarah is feeling agitated. Caroline thinks it because Simon, her ex husband and Evan and Olivia's Dad, is arriving from England to get married. But Sarah has other things on her mind.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Danny is undertaking a drugs trial at Leopard's Den. But de-worming wildebeest isn't Caroline's idea of fun. She hates animals and finds the whole business mind-numbingly boring.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: Du Plessis is in a foul mood. It's his 60th birthday and he has no intentions of celebrating it. But the Trevanions have other ideas and Caroline is organising a surprise party.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fate Worst Than Death
programme.desc: At the bottom of a steep ravine, joggers discover a body mutilated beyond recognition. To catch a ruthless maniac, Lt. Joe Kenda must first solve the puzzle of the victim’s identity.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Innocence
programme.desc: War hero Carl Taylor is beaten to death in the back of an empty semi truck, for no apparent reason. Lt Joe Kenda notices an unusual pattern in the victim’s head wounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A park ranger discovers the corpse of amateur boxer Corey Edge floating in a shallow creek. Kenda learns the victim had ties to the criminal underworld, and investigates a rogue’s gallery of hustlers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Preying on the Innocent
programme.desc: When the son of a prominent politician is murdered in his basement, Lt. Joe Kenda feels pressure from City Hall to solve the case.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Jekyll & Hyde
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Baby Girl
programme.desc: Suzie Dove Miles, a "cat whisperer," is set on getting a fearful Doberman mix at a shelter. Suzie has tried many of Cesar's exercises with Baby Girl, but needs Cesar’s expertise to help Baby Girl become a real dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner. Can Cesar help?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You
programme.desc: At six years old, beagle Gizmo has become very aggressive. Jennifer Lee Pryor runs Pryor’s Planet, a rescue organization to honor her late husband, comedian Richard Pryor.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Luna and K9 Sniffers
programme.desc: A lab mix, has an extreme fear of dog parks, walks and noises at home. Meet a pack of dogs that spends its days keeping the port of Miami free of drugs, and explosives.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Homewrecking Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Writer's Agent, Crypt Ghost, The Doll, Hubert's Curse, Shared Vision.

programme.title: Killer Party
programme.desc: Three teenage thieves infiltrate a mansion dinner party secretly hosted by a group of recovering murderers for the social elite.

programme.title: Poltergeist III
programme.desc: In the climactic finale to the Poltergeist trilogy, those elusive demons are more frightening than ever as they follow Carol Anne to Chicago and inhabit an entire skyscraper.

programme.title: Mirrors
programme.desc: From the director of The Hills Have Eyes comes the terrifying story of troubled ex-cop who must save his family from an unspeakable evil that is using mirrors as a gateway into their home.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mastermind
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret have a fender-bender with a local mobster, they accidentally turn him into the police.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Outward Bound
programme.desc: Bob joins his male colleagues on a canoe trip to a provincial park.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gary
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret thought they knew everything about their next door neighbours, until Joyce and Trevor introduce them to their grown son, Gary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Very Fishy Christmas
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret experience a truly Canadian Christmas.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret decide they need to get fit.

programme.title: On the Case: Betrayal and Regret
programme.desc: After a teenage girl is found murdered in an isolated cemetery, police must untangle a dark mystery in order to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Tracks of a Killer
programme.desc: Police retrace a young woman's final movements with hope that it will lead them straight to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 2
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On the Case.

programme.title: On the Case: Officer Down
programme.desc: A detective moonlighting at an Atlanta hotel is fatally wounded in a furious gun battle with two robbers. The case goes cold for more than 25 years, until an unusual call comes in from an unlikely informant.

programme.title: On the Case: Fatal Turn
programme.desc: A devoted mother vanishes on her way home from work. Her disappearance sends police into the darkest corners of the state and our justice system.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: A one night stand turns deadly when an old nemesis of Harry's reappears.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Morgan and Ancient Mai reluctantly take refuge at Harry's.

programme.title: Dresden Files
programme.desc: Murphy's dad comes to town, bringing up old resentments, and when he starts interfering with her case of reformed criminals dying mysteriously, and Harry's participation in it, things go from bad to worse.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The House
programme.desc: Johnny Smith experiences disturbing visions in his home that lead him to discover the truth about his mother's death.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Enemy Mind
programme.desc: While trying to rescue a runaway teen, Johnny Smith is exposed to mind-altering drugs that have a uniquely adverse effect on his brain.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Netherworld
programme.desc: Struck with a vision of a fiery explosion, Johnny Smith must distinguish between his dream world and reality in order to prevent a disaster.

programme.title: 999 Killer On The Line
programme.desc: Evans: The disturbing story of Alan Evans, who tried to get away with murdering his wife by pretending she had fallen down the stairs, after she found out about his affair.

programme.title: 999 Killer On The Line
programme.desc: Garbutt: In 2010, Robin Garbutt called 999 to report that his wife had been murdered by an armed robber in their home. But flaws were quickly found in his version of events.

programme.title: 999 Killer On The Line
programme.desc: Wilson: Farmer Robert Wilson told police he had accidentally run over his wife with a tractor. But in reality, he was leading a double life and murdered her in cold blood.

programme.title: 999 Killer On The Line
programme.desc: French: After pub landlord Stephen French murdered a customer at the Wisbech Arms, Cambridgeshire, he invented an elaborate cover story to avoid justice.

programme.title: 999 Killer On The Line
programme.desc: Crymble: The story of a man who was jailed for killing his lover's husband, before lying to police about the chain of events in the hope of escaping prosecution.

programme.title: 999 Killer On The Line
programme.desc: Jermey: The story of Alan Jermey, a martial arts expert from Surrey who murdered his partner after she told him she had fallen in love with her boss.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Ancient Ice Zombies
programme.desc: Thirty World War II aircraft all crashed in the same spot on the Greenland Ice sheet, causing experts to wonder if they all fell victim to the Arctic’s Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Lost On Killer Mountain
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Vanishing Of Flight CS-59
programme.desc: A secret underground military research station in the middle of the Greenland Ice Sheet is revealed as one of the most elaborate cover stories in the history of the Cold War.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Inca Child Sacrifice
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Curse Of The Ice Princess

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Vanishing Of Flight CS-59
programme.desc: A secret underground military research station in the middle of the Greenland Ice Sheet is revealed as one of the most elaborate cover stories in the history of the Cold War.

programme.title: Moesha: Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money – Mo’s Money
programme.desc: Moesha wants to get cable and her own phone now that she has a job and is making money.

programme.title: Moesha: A House Is Not A Home
programme.desc: Moesha is living with Andell after having moved out of Frank & Dee’s home.

programme.title: Moesha: Moesha Meets Brandy
programme.desc: Moesha meets Brandy at a concert and we discover that Moesha is having a romance with Aaron, a college student.

programme.title: Moesha: Homecoming
programme.desc: With a little help from Myles and a visit from Grandma Mitchell, Moesha moves back home and returns to Crenshaw High.

programme.title: Moesha: Hello! What’s This?
programme.desc: Dee finds a joint in the couch while cleaning the house. Frank and Dee assume and accuse Mo, but Moesha is shocked when she catches Myles smoking.

programme.title: Moesha: Psyche Your Mind
programme.desc: Based on the family turmoil, the family begins counseling, but Moesha doesn’t want to air the family’s 'dirty laundry'.

programme.title: Moesha: Teacher
programme.desc: Moesha is attracted to a substitute teacher at Crenshaw. After they kiss, he leaves the school for 'personal reasons'.

programme.title: Moesha: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are stalked by a student who was just released from jail who they haven’t seen since the third grade when he got into trouble because of them. Parody of Brandy’s feature 'I Still Know What You Did Last Summer…'

programme.title: Moesha: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are invited to a college to attend a Prospective Freshman Weekend and someone slips a 'roofie' in her drink. Her boyfriend Aaron keeps her from being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Moesha: Birth Control
programme.desc: Moesha gets birth control pills when she decides she would like to lose her virginity to Aaron. However, things get complicated when Dee finds the pills in her purse.

programme.title: Moesha: A Class Act Christmas
programme.desc: Moesha, Hakeem, and the other employees of the Class Act are held hostage by a man dressed as Santa Claus protesting age discrimination.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Episode 16
programme.desc: With the market constantly shifting, there's no such thing as a "simple search" anymore. Our dynamic duo will have to work harder than ever before to make sure they come up with the goods.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Aberdeen City
programme.desc: Newlyweds Emma and Mike are bursting to move on and up.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties
programme.desc: The home counties are the location for this weeks search. Phil is helping picky buyers Lysan and Bo leave the hustle and bustle of London and get back to their roots in Bedfordshire.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hampshire
programme.desc: They've got a sailor looking for his first home and a soldier who's about to be made homeless.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Northampton
programme.desc: Despite a slowdown in the housing market, property is still very much headline news, and we love it! But, finding that all singing, all dancing dream home is tougher than ever!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East London
programme.desc: From a design duo looking for their next project to a couple who are finally ready to put down roots and buy a home together this search takes Phil and Kirstie to South East London and on a journey like no other!

programme.title: Dynasty: Ginger Snaps
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful as she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty: Delta Woe
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath. Toying with Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tankers, Cadavers to Chance
programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their families secret.

programme.title: Dynasty: Clear the Dex
programme.desc: Alexis hires a mercenary to get her ships back; Adam and Jeff exchange blows after accuses Adam of being disloyal to Blake; Dex begins to doubt Alexis can ever offer him the kind of love he needs.

programme.title: Dynasty: Virginia Reels
programme.desc: Sable tries to convince Blake she is on his side. Dex is attracted by her loyalty; Sammy Jo's interest in Tanner McBride intensifies; Dex attacks Adam after learning he took advantage of Virginia; Joanna becomes jealous of Sable's interest in Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty: House of the Falling Son
programme.desc: Sable persuades Heath not to kill her. Upset by her close encounter with death, she goes to Dex for comfort; Alexis goes to Paris to keep an eye on Boyd's commando operation to retrieve her oil tankers. Seeing a little of Dex in Boyd.

programme.title: Arthur: Fifteen
programme.desc: How much can Arthur and his friends do in 15 minutes? Can they all accomplish these missions impossible before the clock counts all the way down? Only time will tell!

programme.title: Arthur: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister
programme.desc: What's a budding entrepreneur to do when her homemade cookies hit the big time? Especially when the recipe isn't really hers? Then, Arthur and Francine would love to lend their sisters to Sue Ellen, who's sick of being an only child.

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., All Fired Up/I'd Rather Read It Myself
programme.desc: When Ms. Morgan announces they'll be having a fire drill during preschool, D.W. wants no part of it--it sounds way too scary. Then, the Tibble Twins are better than D.W. at just about everything.

programme.title: Arthur: Portrait of the Artist as a Young Tibble/The Secret Guardians
programme.desc: The Tibble Twins start a new business to earn enough money to buy the coveted Krummy Kreepy Kastle. When and friends stumble upon a beautiful woodland oasis right by their homes, they vow to tell no one and keep it as their secret spot.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., The Picky Eater/Buster And The Daredevils
programme.desc: It's wrong to call D.W. a picky eater. The only things she won't eat are vegetables, fish, fruit, and meat. Then, Arthur and Buster meet two really cool kids and, naturally, are utterly dazzled. How far will Buster go to be cool?

programme.title: Arthur: Francine Redecorates/Arthur The Loser
programme.desc: Francine and Catherine are very different, but it’s no fun if you're two sisters sharing the same room. Then, there's only one thing in life Arthur really wants—to win! But he just can't stop losing. Is it really so wrong to cheat a little?

programme.title: Arthur: The Election/Francine Goes To War
programme.desc: There’s a mock election in Mr. Ratburn's class, but Muffy takes it seriously. How far will she go to win? Francine can't believe it. She gets in trouble no matter what she does -- thanks to the new nosy next-door neighbor!

programme.title: Arthur: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: Nadine, D.W.'s imaginary friend is missing. Sue Ellen can't wait to travel on an old-fashioned train, but once onboard, she discovers that the train is not as spectacular as she had hoped–until she finds a mysterious diary.

programme.title: World War II: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: Every war seized new tactics; some inspired, some desperate, all attempting to influence the course of battles. Campaigns waged against non military targets to demoralize. Suicide missions launched when traditional weapons failed. Rules were rewritten.

programme.title: World War II: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: A world war is a patchwork of actions. Land. Sea. Air. Massive, or small scale. The stories of these actions, are just as varied. This episode describes battles of amphibious forces, climate, geography, and the problems of supply.

programme.title: World War II: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: Through history, armies marched to face each other on favored ground and clashed to decide a campaign, a war, an empire. With the 20th century that changed. The battles of the WWII happened anywhere and everywhere, in every weather and climate.

programme.title: World War II: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: Some words transcend their origins as humble place names. They are carved into history as turning points which influenced the course of WWII, the fate of nations, and the make-up of our world. El Alameine, Okinawa, and Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Hitting Back
programme.desc: After surviving the German bombing campaign of British cities, RAF Bomber Command struck back against Germany. The devastating consequences of raids, for both for the young men in the skies and the people on the ground, are portrayed in this film.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Getting Home
programme.desc: In this film, Bomber Command personnel and a Luftwaffe pilot take the viewer through the frightening reality of fighting in the skies as they try to get a damaged bomber home.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Max and co-host iO Tillett Wright help 18-year-old Mecca connect with the boy she's loved for the past 5 years. But when iO discovers that Mecca's digital beau may be using her pictures to catfish others, Mecca needs answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev and Max receive emails from opposite sides of the same online romance, each concerned that the other may be a catfish! The guys are taken aback when one side decides to follow through with their marriage plans!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Kailani has fallen for Sam, her gay friend's online ex-boyfriend. Sam claims to love Kailani, but has been acting strange since she has tried to meet up with him. Nev and Max investigate. (S6, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Dylan receives an anonymous text warning him that his online love, Ally, is not who she says she is, and enlists Nev and Max to help find her. After the mystery texter is revealed, the guys uncover a huge web of deceit!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Colleen met Tony online and fell in love. Despite never meeting, Tony proposed over the phone and Colleen accepted! Nev and Max help her face reality to reveal the man she's engaged to! (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev and Max embark on the biggest case of their lives as they track down the infamous, Shelly Chartier, to uncover new truths as they investigate the celebrity catfishing of Paris Roxanne and NBA star, Chris 'Birdman' Andersen.
